 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-y69a","title":"E2E Tests: Staff Picks and Featured Content","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-i53g.

## Task
Create E2E tests for staff picks and featured content functionality.

## Test Scenarios
1. **Staff Picks Display**
   - Staff picks section visible on home
   - Carousel/grid displays correctly
   - Featured badge visible
   - Links work correctly

2. **Admin Feature Flow**
   - Admin can feature content
   - Admin can unfeature content
   - Feature reason/note saved
   - Featured order configurable

3. **Featured Categories**
   - Category-specific features work
   - Featured for X days works
   - Auto-expire features

4. **User Experience**
   - Featured content stands out
   - Click tracking works
   - Mobile display correct

## Logging Requirements
- Log feature/unfeature actions
- Log featured content views
- Log click-through events
- Screenshot featured sections

## Files to Create
- e2e/discovery/staff-picks.spec.ts
- e2e/admin/feature-content.spec.ts
- e2e/lib/feature-helpers.ts

## Success Criteria
- Featuring flow works for admins
- Featured content displays correctly
- Auto-expire functions
- Analytics tracked

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-y6dx","title":"Task: E2E test - Copy button with clipboard verification","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:47:20.801443168-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T19:07:27.464764016-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T19:07:27.464764016-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented in e2e/web/search-copy.spec.ts - 'copy button shows success feedback' test includes clipboard content verification using navigator.clipboard.readText()","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-y6dx","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-945","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:57:20.239151969-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-y6lx","title":"E2E Tests: i18n Language Switching","description":"## Origin
Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-9h5x. Keep both repos in sync.

## Task
Create E2E tests for multi-language switching.

## Why This Matters
- Ensures localization flows work for users
- Prevents regressions in translated routes

## Test Scenarios
1. Switch language from header selector
2. Verify content changes language
3. Persist language preference across reload
4. Fallback to default language when missing translation

## Logging Requirements
- Log selected locale and route
- Screenshot localized pages

## Files to Create
- e2e/i18n/language-switch.spec.ts

## Success Criteria
- Language switching works consistently
- Preference persists
- Fallback behavior correct
